conclusion: L4 成立：网络态程序胶囊已写入 L3 接收器候选路径，并从 branch Raw/CDN 读回后由受控解释器触发一次可审计程序脉冲。
truth_boundary: L4 proves a minimal network-resident declarative capsule can be stored on the receiver candidate, read back, validated, and used to trigger an allowlisted pulse. The interpretation and writes still use local/GitHub CPU; this is not CPU-free network computation.
